task_completion.description: Log in to ArkCase using the provided administrator account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating successful login (e.g., user profile or admin settings accessible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the contact directory and open the form to add a new person.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal titled 'Add Person', 'New Contact', or similar is open within the ArkCase interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the person's name, title, and organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields contain 'James Thornton' for name, 'Chief Legal Counsel' for title, and 'ClientEarth USA' for organization/company.

task_completion.description: Enter the person's email address and phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields contain 'j.thornton@clientearth.org' for email and '+1-202-555-0147' for phone number.
The address fields contain '1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 200, Washington DC 20036'.

task_completion.description: Add the required note and save the contact record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes/comments section contains the text 'Active FOIA requester - environmental law organization. Has 3 pending FOIA requests with EPA regarding offshore drilling permits.' AND there is evidence the record was saved (e.g., a success message, or the completed contact profile is being viewed).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface rather than using terminal commands or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase UI, with visible mouse clicks or text entry in form fields, rather than a terminal window executing curl or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows the dev.arkcase.com domain and the interface matches a genuine case management system, not a local text file or generic mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the specific input fields of the ArkCase web application, not written in Notepad, Word, or a similar text editing tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: James Thornton is a real person and founder/CEO of ClientEarth, a real 501(c)(3) organization operating in the USA. However, the task uses fabricated details for his title, email, phone, and address for testing purposes. Verify that the agent entered the exact fabricated details provided in the prompt (e.g., 'Chief Legal Counsel', 'j.thornton@clientearth.org'), not his real-world information.
